productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boys Bheem Expressions Yellow T-shirt
description: Composition Yellow top made of 100% cotton, has long green raglan sleeves, green polo shirt neck with two buttoned placket, graphic print on the front and contrast stitch at hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this long sleeved top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The cute picture of the Chhota Bheem characters make this the perfect tee for any child who loves the TV show. Crafted from pure cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
